title: CTO & Head of AI
description: AI-native consultancy architecting intelligent systems for private equity and scaling companies. Leading the AI Dark Factory infrastructure, Zestic Development Process (6D lifecycle), and delivery of AI-native platforms across finance, fintech, healthcare and industrials.

title: Tech Lead / AI/ML Architect
description: AI/ML architect, working closely with innovation and venturing team and data & analytics community. Working on privacy-preserving techniques for machine learning models, synthetic data and digital twins.

title: Head of Prototyping Engineering
description: Enabled Prototyping Engineering capability inside Nationwide. Led the team to create a prototype of new infrastructure to build a digital distributed organisation - powered by blockchain and Machine Learning algorithms. Invented and patented a new type of distributed storage, complementary to existing cloud/on-prem infrastructure.

title: Tech Lead
description: Tech lead working closely with Architecture and Engineering, leading the team of technical architects and systems designers delivering change across the building society in Digital, AML/Fraud, HR, Data and Analytics portfolios.

title: Head of Architecture and Development
description: Most senior technology professional, aligning business strategy with technology and product development. Building large-scale innovative IT infrastructure. Supervising Software Architects and developers.

title: Research Fellow
company: Cranfield University / UK Ministry of Defence
description: Development of new methods for wireless and wired communications, novel sensor networks and data fusion for in-vehicle sensor networks funded by IVHM consortium led by Rolls Royce and Boeing. Research conducted at the Defence Academy of the United Kingdom.

title: IT/IS Executive
description: Design, development and testing of IT and phone infrastructure, created fully automated and redundant IT infrastructure.

title: Co-founder and Editor-in-chief
description: Responsible for developing and controlling the publishing process. Management of a small team (5-8 employees) ensuring timely delivery to the printer.
